children.name: Stomolophus
children.description: Stomolophus — a genus of cannonball jellyfish in the family Stomolophidae.

children.name: Stomolophus agaricus
children.description: Stomolophus agaricus — a species in the genus Stomolophus, family Stomolophidae. Also known as cannonball jellyfish.

children.name: Stomolophus fritillaris
children.description: Stomolophus fritillaris — a species in the genus Stomolophus, family Stomolophidae. Also known as cannonball jellyfish.

children.name: Stomolophus fritillarius
children.description: Stomolophus fritillarius is a species of true jellyfish in the family Stomolophidae.

children.name: Stomolophus spec
children.description: Stomolophus spec — a species in the genus Stomolophus, family Stomolophidae. Also known as cannonball jellyfish.
